Transition to New Court System, , , as amended by , , ; , , ; , , ; , , ; , , , which provided for transfer to the new court system of cases, and matters and proceedings in cases, under the Bankruptcy Act [former Title 11] pending at the end of , in the courts of bankruptcy continued under , with certain exceptions, and cases and proceedings arising under or related to cases under Title 11 pending at the end of , and directed that civil actions pending on , over which a bankruptcy court had jurisdiction on , not abate, but continuation of such actions not finally determined before , be removed to a bankruptcy court under this chapter, and that all law books, publications, etc., furnished bankruptcy judges as of , be transferred to the United States bankruptcy courts under the supervision of the Director of the Administrative Office of the United States Courts, was repealed by , , , 346, eff. .Pub.
